case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. JESSICA E LONG ET AL

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200016370) FILED BY DEFENDANT LONG, JESSICA E
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APR-28-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-29-2021 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAR-29-2021 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'S MOTION FOR ORDER DEEMING ADMISSIONS ADMITTED, THE COURT RULES AS FOLLOWS: AFTER PLAINTIFF'S MOTION WAS FILED, THE DEFENDANT SERVED RESPONSES THAT WERE SUBSTANTIALLY IN COMPLIANCE UNDER C.C.P. SEC. 2033.220. THEREFORE, PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO HAVE THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS DEEMED ADMITTED IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOW WAIVED ITS REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS. THEREFORE, NO MONETARY SANCTIONS WILL BE ISSUED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRUCE HIGHMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2022 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-19-2021 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-01-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-13-2021 Set For Trial On Aug-23-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION / Notice Of & Motion For Order Deeming Admissions Admitted
Off Calendar Mar-29-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Defendant JESSICA E. LONG (Tel: 240-772-1558) in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'s Motion For Order Deeming Admissions Admitted.

Defendant stipulates to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Judge Pro Tem and defendant authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter not contested/argued.

The Court rules as follows: After plaintiff's motion was filed, the defendant served responses that were substantially in compliance under C.C.P. Sec. 2033.220. Therefore, plaintiff's request to have the requests for admissions deemed admitted is denied. Plaintiff has now waived its request for monetary sanctions. Therefore, no monetary sanctions will be issued.

Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
